mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, email, is_active, created_at, role) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, true, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'USER')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, email, is_active, created_at, role) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{is_active}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{role})
